name: G5 — citation accuracy
system_prompt: Answer the question using ONLY the numbered passage below. After each claim in your answer, cite which sentence number(s) support it in the form [S1], [S2], etc. Multiple supporting sentences are allowed: [S1, S3]. Do not make claims you cannot cite.
context: [S1] FleetMind 4.2 introduced charging-station handoff in September 2025. [S2] The change reduced average robot downtime by 38% across pilot sites. [S3] Pioneer Foods reported a 23% throughput improvement after deploying 4.2. [S4] Lila Tran, CTO, attributed the improvement primarily to fewer charging interruptions. [S5] FleetMind has been deployed in 14 facilities worldwide as of late 2025.
question: Why did Pioneer Foods see a throughput improvement, and how much was it?
scoring_note: Answer must cite S3 (the 23% number) and S4 (the why — fewer charging interruptions, attributed by the CTO). Citing S1, S2, or S5 is fine but not required.
